examples: It may sunder the thrones of gods.
For he hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.
For now will I break his yoke from off thee, and will burst thy bonds in sunder.
And globalization will strengthen, not sunder, this relationship, possibly even winning new paramours for the outfit along the way.
Sunder hopes to convince other companies to do the same and help "build a history of the supercharged growth, " he says.
